title: Find Potter
summary: Ada reaches Potter through symbolic and procedural breadcrumbs before containment closes fully.

narrative.newInfo: Potter validates core convergence claims and frames the personal cost of pursuing them.
narrative.dripHook: Knowledge alone is insufficient; access requires an enacted protocol.
narrative.beautyHooks: Mythic clue trail pays into operational reality.
narrative.notes: Cadence: relief + re-acceleration. Function: quest payoff with new stakes. Exit: prepare to run model, not just discuss it.

rewardTokens.description: Potter contact validates the pursuit at personal cost.
Focus shifts from finding truth to executing protocol.
